title: [FIRRTL][SV] Support substitutions in fprintf output file name. Add sv.sformatf.

features.name: sformatf dynamic string formatting
features.description: Code should include $sformatf function call for dynamic string formatting with format specifiers like %d, %0t, %m, and %c

features.name: file descriptor get for dynamic filename
features.description: Code should include FileDescriptor::get() call with $sformatf argument for dynamic file name resolution

features.name: fwrite with dynamic file descriptor
features.description: Code should include $fwrite with a file descriptor that was dynamically computed from $sformatf

features.name: time format specifier in sformatf
features.description: Code should include %0t format specifier in $sformatf for time-based dynamic file names

features.name: percent_m specifier for hierarchical path in sformatf
features.description: Code should include %m format specifier in $sformatf for hierarchical module path in dynamic strings
